title: Handle Async Errors
description:
Welcome to Rank Challenge. This async function awaits a network call, but if it rejects the whole process crashes with an unhandled rejection.

Wrap the `await` in a `try/catch` block so failures are caught and logged instead of crashing.
objectives: Wrap the `await` call in a `try { } catch { }`
hints: A `try/catch` around an `await` catches promise rejections like synchronous errors.
Put `const data = await fetchData();` inside `try` and log the error in `catch`.
